name: Marumi Fit + Slim MC UV
description: This is the Marumi Fit + Slim MC UV Filter 37mm This new series of filters from Marumi cuts UV rays (390mm and under) to reproduce a clear image of distant views. To protect lens from dust and scratches. These ultra slim filters are lightweight and approx. 11g in weight. They are supplied in smart packaging made from eco-friendly lead free materials

features.Specification :: UV cut lens protective filter having multi-layer coating. | Tightly holds the lens cap despite the ultra-thin frame. | Cuts UV rays for clear image of distant views Acts as a lens protector against dust and scratches
